channel.title: Rosso Consulting · Writing
channel.description: Essays on hospitality distribution, AI deployment, channel economics, and the operator-buyer interface. Written by Marco Rosso.

item.title: The Rate Parity Trap
item.description: How OTA promotions quietly eat your direct bookings while you maintain "parity."
item.author: marco@rossoconsulting.ch (Marco Rosso)

item.title: Your hotel is winning the click — and losing the booking
item.description: The conversion gap between OTAs and direct is not a pricing problem. It is a product problem.
item.author: marco@rossoconsulting.ch (Marco Rosso)

item.title: The one skill that will define luxury hotel leadership in the AI era
item.description: It is not "AI strategy" or "human touch." It is the judgment to know what is neither.
item.author: marco@rossoconsulting.ch (Marco Rosso)

item.title: Online vs offline: why your hotel is undervaluing its offline channel
item.description: The hotel industry spent fifteen years chasing online — and learned to undervalue what it left behind.
item.author: marco@rossoconsulting.ch (Marco Rosso)
